items.title: Data centers are coming for rural America
items.description: At its peak, the Androscoggin paper mill in Jay, Maine, a rural town about 67 miles northwest of Portland, employed about 1,500 people - until a pulp digester exploded in 2020, forcing the mill to close permanently. items.title: Meta will tell parents when their teens add new interests to their Instagram algorithm
items.description: Starting Tuesday, parents can get more details about what their teens are up to on Instagram. Meta is adding a feature to its Teen Accounts that shows parents the "general topics their teens engage with," like "basketball" or "fashion." Meta also says it will soon start notifying parents when their ...

items.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says Elon Musk did "huge damage" to the culture of the AI startup.
